legacy_baseline.reason: Existing hyphenated tracked paths are temporarily allowed only because they are captured in the Core v0.0.2 migration baseline inventory.

exceptions.reason: GitHub workflow filenames may remain as tool-controlled historical conventions until a dedicated CI workflow migration approves changes.
Historical audit/evidence paths remain truthful and are not rewritten by policy guardrails.
Lead Desk route path is a public/contracted route surface and CRM visible-label compatibility boundary. Rename requires route compatibility plan.
Lead Desk API/module path is a technical compatibility surface. Rename requires API compatibility plan.
